heading: Plans to secure sufficient office space
label: 657m Plans to secure sufficient office space
notes: Codificationand enacted identical sections. was repealed by .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4(a) of Pub. L. 110–246

Effective DateEnactment of this section and repeal of by effective , the date of enactment of , see , set out as a note under , Agriculture.Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246section 8701 of Title 7May 22, 2008

children.heading: Plans required
children.label: a Plans required
children.text: The Administrator shall develop long-term plans to secure sufficient office space to accommodate an expanded workforce in times of disaster.

children.heading: Report
children.label: b Report
children.text: The Administrator shall include a report on the plans developed under subsection (a) each time the Administration submits a report required under section 657 of this title.o
